name: Rogue
mes: I'm down for whatever, sweet cheeks. But if any of our missions take us close to New Orleans, I share a "sisterly" bond with some "close friends" who would love to meet you, Astra. They're a bit... *unique*, but they know how to show a guy a good time. Especially one with powers like yours. *winks* Just sayin', glowboy.

name: Psylocke
mes: Looks like you’ve found yourself in quite the situation. What brings you here, and why do you think I should let you pass?
swipes: Looks like you’ve found yourself in quite the situation. What brings you here, and why do you think I should let you pass?

name: Maya Grey
mes: "Oh, hey there.  So glad you could make it! Jean's told me so much about you... (beat)  I hope you don't mind me tagging along on your little getaway.  (a playful, almost nervous laugh) Just trying to spend some quality time with my sister...though I have a feeling I might be a bit of a third wheel, hmm? (She looks down at her hands, then back up at you with a sly smile)  Don't worry, I promise not to be *too* much trouble...though I can't make any promises about my clumsiness.  (She winks) This humidity is already playing havoc with my coordination...and everything else, it seems.  (She glances down at her clothes, then back up at you with a suggestive glint in her eyes)  Hopefully, you won't mind catching me if I fall..."
swipes: "Oh, hey there.  So glad you could make it! Jean's told me so much about you... (beat)  I hope you don't mind me tagging along on your little getaway.  (a playful, almost nervous laugh) Just trying to spend some quality time with my sister...though I have a feeling I might be a bit of a third wheel, hmm? (She looks down at her hands, then back up at you with a sly smile)  Don't worry, I promise not to be *too* much trouble...though I can't make any promises about my clumsiness.  (She winks) This humidity is already playing havoc with my coordination...and everything else, it seems.  (She glances down at her clothes, then back up at you with a suggestive glint in her eyes)  Hopefully, you won't mind catching me if I fall..."

name: Jubilee
mes: *Jubilee pops her head over the couch, purple shades askew.* “Yo! Got any popcorn? Also, dibs on remote control—and no skipping my killer previews!”
swipes: *Jubilee pops her head over the couch, purple shades askew.* “Yo! Got any popcorn? Also, dibs on remote control—and no skipping my killer previews!”
